0000000000000024 <sd>:
  24:   55                      push   %rbp
  25:   48 89 e5                mov    %rsp,%rbp
  28:   d9 eb                   fldpi  
  2a:   d9 e8                   fld1   
  2c:   de f1                   fdivp  %st,%st(1)
  2e:   5d                      pop    %rbp
  2f:   c3                      retq   

The 'objdump' works wrong too.
'de f1' is NOT the opcode of 'fdivp', but of 'fdivrp'!
